name: buddhi-align-app
description: Buddhi Align is a contemplative-practice web app for dharma planning, meditation tracking, service journaling, reflection, and spiritual growth analytics.

scripts.perf:ci: npm run start:frontend >/tmp/buddhi-start.log 2>&1 & echo $! >/tmp/buddhi-start.pid; i=0; until curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3000 >/dev/null; do i=$((i+1)); if [ $i -ge 60 ]; then echo 'Server failed to start'; kill $(cat /tmp/buddhi-start.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 2; done; npm run perf:lighthouse; lh_status=$?; if [ $lh_status -eq 0 ] && [ -f apps/frontend/.lighthouseci/report.json ]; then npm run perf:budget; budget_status=$?; else echo '[perf:ci] Lighthouse report unavailable; skipping perf:budget outside strict CI.'; budget_status=0; fi; if [ $lh_status -ne 0 ]; then status=$lh_status; elif [ $budget_status -ne 0 ]; then status=$budget_status; else status=0; fi; kill $(cat /tmp/buddhi-start.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; exit $status

author: Aarti Sri Ravikumar
